US President Donald Trump will meet Lebanese and Israeli envoys at a new round of peace talks Thursday, with Beirut seeking a one-month extension of a shaky ceasefire set to expire.

geopolitics.title: Afghans Who Helped U.S. Forces Say They’re Being Pushed Back to the Taliban
geopolitics.description: Once promised a move to the United States, Afghan refugees who helped U.S. forces say they face ‘bad or worse’ options: resettlement to Congo or returning home to live under the Taliban.

geopolitics.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump to Host Israeli and Lebanese Officials at White House
geopolitics.description: The talks, scheduled for later today, were moved to the White House from the State Department. The fighting in Lebanon between Israel and Hezbollah, mainly halted by a cease-fire, has threatened to undermine efforts to broker a larger peace deal in the Iran war.

geopolitics.description: Le vainqueur de Viktor Orban entend introduire de la progressivité dans l’impôt sur le revenu, dont le taux est aujourd’hui unique, et créer une taxe sur les patrimoines les plus élevés.

geopolitics.title: Pope condemns killing of protesters in Iran, reaffirms stance against war
geopolitics.description:
By Joshua McElwee

ABOARD THE PAPAL FLIGHT, April 23 (Reuters) - Pope Leo on Thursday firmly condemned the killing of protesters in Iran, after U.S. President Donald Trump criticized the Catholic leader last week for not doing so while speaking out against the U.S.-Israel war with Iran.

commodities.description: FSIS establishes Food Safety Center in Iowa and Science Center in Georgia. Several ERS, NIFA, NASS and ARS staff will start relocating.

commodities.title: Kinder Morgan Raises Dividend
